race.description: Dubbo Plasterboard & Building Supplies Country Boosted Showcase Hcp (C1)
race.comment: SPRING PROSPECT (4) consistent mare resuming. Had a throw at the stumps when a tiring eleventh behind Tom Vegas over 1400m at Mudgee in the CDRA Champs last February. Can stalk the good speed and put these away. CHAPPOLICIOUS (5) big improver third-up when she sat on the speed to run third over this trip at Bathurst. Tongue-tie goes on and has the speed to get across from the draw fourth-up. Each-way. ALBY'S MATE (2) faded late in the heavy (10) conditions with the 57.5kg when fifth over 1006m at Port Macquarie. Placed at this track and worth thought fifth-up. SOULS COMPANION (3) resumes without a trial and has a host of gear changes. Came to the end of his prep when he failed to run the 1600m out when finishing thirteenth at Scone last November. Maps well and can surprise fresh.
